subcodes.title: Words to a stranger, spoken on 1914-05-09
subcodes.first_line: This is not only the golden age but the age of Diamond. This is the Century of Lights! This is the cycle of Love. This is the glorious Down of the Sun of Reality
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @coming-of-age; maturity of mankind, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology
